flags.note: Dispute level 2: multiple significant translation options.
νόμος — "law" (general moral law) vs. "the Law" (Torah specifically) vs. "a law" (a principle). Context determines which, but translators must choose.
πίστις — "faith" (subjective trust) vs. "faithfulness" (objective reliability). "Faith of Christ" (G1342 Χριστοῦ) may mean trust IN Christ or the faithfulness OF Christ.
